faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Bayside?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Bayside typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home or apartment, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Bayside homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Bayside can be completed in 4-8 hours for heat treatments or require 2-3 visits for chemical applications. We work efficiently to minimize disruption and typically schedule follow-up inspections within 2-3 weeks to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Bayside home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to eliminate bed bugs at all life stages. Chemical treatments may require leaving for 4-6 hours. We provide detailed preparation instructions and work around your schedule for minimal inconvenience.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Bayside?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our licensed technicians. Heat treatments use no chemicals at all, while our chemical solutions are carefully applied to targeted areas. Pets and children can safely return once the treatment is complete and surfaces are dry.
